call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced HDFC Life and a new plan with income benefits, to which the customer responded with a neutral 'Haan ji'.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was initially passive but became engaged once the income benefit was explained, eventually requesting a follow-up.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer requested the plan name be sent via WhatsApp after expressing interest in the income structure.
call_narrative.ending: The agent agreed to send the plan name via WhatsApp and call back on Friday.
